subcodes.first_line: O celestial friends! Earthly souls there are whose wings are sullied by this nether world, yet whose essence is a heavenly gem [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران آسمانی خاکی جانهاایست که آلوده بالایش اینجهان گردد و آسمانی گوهریست
subcodes.subjects: @attaining the life of the spirit, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @love and unity
